# What

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling or CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run format:check`, `npm run validate`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm test` pass locally.
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] No personal data is included (no real member ids or account-tied identifiers in fixtures).
- [ ] The change respects the privacy model: the extension still reaches only `www.linkedin.com` and `127.0.0.1`. If it does not, PRIVACY.md and the manifest are updated in this PR.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if user-facing behavior changed.
